targets.rawSql:
WITH unique_records AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        [Part Type],
        [Identical ID],
        [QC Member],
        [Year Record],
        [Month Record],
        [File Run No.],
        [Sequence],
        LTRIM(RTRIM([Mold No.]))        AS mold_clean,
        LTRIM(RTRIM([M/C No.]))         AS mc_clean,
        LTRIM(RTRIM([Part No.]))        AS part_no_clean,
        LTRIM(RTRIM([Cavity No.]))      AS cavity_clean,
        LTRIM(RTRIM([ISC]))            AS isc_clean,
        LTRIM(RTRIM([Judgement [S]]]))    AS judgement_clean,
        LTRIM(RTRIM([Part Name]))      AS part_name,
        LTRIM(RTRIM([Material No.]))    AS material_no,
        LTRIM(RTRIM([OI No.]))          AS oi_no,
        LTRIM(RTRIM([Sample Part No.])) AS sample_part_no,
        LTRIM(RTRIM([Lot Material]))   AS lot_material,
        LTRIM(RTRIM([Condition STD]))  AS condition_std,
        LTRIM(RTRIM([QC Member]))      AS qc_member_val
    FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
    WHERE [Part Type] = 'Injection'
      AND [ISC] IS NOT NULL
      AND LTRIM(RTRIM([ISC])) != ''
      AND LTRIM(RTRIM([Judgement [S]]])) = 'X'
      AND ('All' IN (${year:singlequote})
           OR LTRIM(RTRIM([Year Record])) IN (${year:singlequote}))
      AND (
          'All' IN (${month:singlequote})
          OR CASE CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM([Month Record])) AS INT)
                  WHEN 1  THEN 'Jan' WHEN 2  THEN 'Feb' WHEN 3  THEN 'Mar'
                  WHEN 4  THEN 'Apr' WHEN 5  THEN 'May' WHEN 6  THEN 'Jun'
                  WHEN 7  THEN 'Jul' WHEN 8  THEN 'Aug' WHEN 9  THEN 'Sep'
                  WHEN 10 THEN 'Oct' WHEN 11 THEN 'Nov' WHEN 12 THEN 'Dec'
             END IN (${month:singlequote})
      )
      AND ('All' IN (${mold_no:singlequote})
           OR LTRIM(RTRIM([Mold No.])) IN (${mold_no:singlequote}))
      AND ('All' IN (${mc_no:singlequote})
           OR LTRIM(RTRIM([M/C No.]))  IN (${mc_no:singlequote}))
      AND ('All' IN (${part_no:singlequote})
           OR LTRIM(RTRIM([Part No.])) IN (${part_no:singlequote}))
),
isc_cavity_breakdown AS (
    SELECT
        isc_clean,
        cavity_clean,
        COUNT(*)            AS ng_count_by_cavity, -- ✅ คงเดิม ไม่เปลี่ยน
        MAX(part_name)      AS part_name,
        MAX(material_no)    AS material_no,
        MAX(oi_no)          AS oi_no,
        MAX(sample_part_no) AS sample_part_no,
        MAX(lot_material)   AS lot_material,
        MAX(condition_std)  AS condition_std,
        MAX(qc_member_val)  AS qc_member_val
    FROM unique_records
    GROUP BY isc_clean, cavity_clean
)
SELECT
    isc_clean                   AS [ISC],
    SUM(ng_count_by_cavity)     AS [Judgement X Count], -- ✅ ตัวเลขคงเดิม
    -- ✅ Breakdown by Cavity คงเดิม แสดงทุก Cavity
    STRING_AGG(
        CONCAT('Cavity No: ', cavity_clean, ' = ', ng_count_by_cavity),
        CHAR(10)
    )                           AS [Breakdown by Cavity],
    -- ✅ เปลี่ยน STRING_AGG → MAX() → ได้ค่าเดียว ไม่ซ้ำ
    MAX(part_name)              AS [Part Name],
    MAX(material_no)            AS [Material No],
    MAX(oi_no)                  AS [OI No.],
    MAX(sample_part_no)         AS [Sample Part No.],
    MAX(lot_material)           AS [Lot Material],
    MAX(condition_std)          AS [Condition STD],
    MAX(qc_member_val)          AS [QC Member]
FROM isc_cavity_breakdown
GROUP BY isc_clean
ORDER BY SUM(ng_count_by_cavity) DESC, isc_clean ASC

list.definition:
SELECT DISTINCT LTRIM(RTRIM([Year Record])) AS __text, LTRIM(RTRIM([Year Record])) AS __value
FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
ORDER BY __value DESC
list.label: Year
list.name: year
list.query:
SELECT DISTINCT LTRIM(RTRIM([Year Record])) AS __text, LTRIM(RTRIM([Year Record])) AS __value
FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
ORDER BY __value DESC

list.definition:
SELECT
    CASE LTRIM(RTRIM([Month Record]))
        WHEN '1'  THEN 'Jan' WHEN '2'  THEN 'Feb'
        WHEN '3'  THEN 'Mar' WHEN '4'  THEN 'Apr'
        WHEN '5'  THEN 'May' WHEN '6'  THEN 'Jun'
        WHEN '7'  THEN 'Jul' WHEN '8'  THEN 'Aug'
        WHEN '9'  THEN 'Sep' WHEN '10' THEN 'Oct'
        WHEN '11' THEN 'Nov' WHEN '12' THEN 'Dec'
    END AS __text,
    CASE LTRIM(RTRIM([Month Record]))                                       -- ✅ __value เป็นชื่อเดือนด้วย
        WHEN '1'  THEN 'Jan' WHEN '2'  THEN 'Feb'
        WHEN '3'  THEN 'Mar' WHEN '4'  THEN 'Apr'
        WHEN '5'  THEN 'May' WHEN '6'  THEN 'Jun'
        WHEN '7'  THEN 'Jul' WHEN '8'  THEN 'Aug'
        WHEN '9'  THEN 'Sep' WHEN '10' THEN 'Oct'
        WHEN '11' THEN 'Nov' WHEN '12' THEN 'Dec'
    END AS __value
FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT [Month Record]
    FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
    WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM([Month Record])) != ''
) AS t
ORDER BY CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM([Month Record])) AS INT)
list.label: Month
list.name: month
list.query:
SELECT
    CASE LTRIM(RTRIM([Month Record]))
        WHEN '1'  THEN 'Jan' WHEN '2'  THEN 'Feb'
        WHEN '3'  THEN 'Mar' WHEN '4'  THEN 'Apr'
        WHEN '5'  THEN 'May' WHEN '6'  THEN 'Jun'
        WHEN '7'  THEN 'Jul' WHEN '8'  THEN 'Aug'
        WHEN '9'  THEN 'Sep' WHEN '10' THEN 'Oct'
        WHEN '11' THEN 'Nov' WHEN '12' THEN 'Dec'
    END AS __text,
    CASE LTRIM(RTRIM([Month Record]))                                       -- ✅ __value เป็นชื่อเดือนด้วย
        WHEN '1'  THEN 'Jan' WHEN '2'  THEN 'Feb'
        WHEN '3'  THEN 'Mar' WHEN '4'  THEN 'Apr'
        WHEN '5'  THEN 'May' WHEN '6'  THEN 'Jun'
        WHEN '7'  THEN 'Jul' WHEN '8'  THEN 'Aug'
        WHEN '9'  THEN 'Sep' WHEN '10' THEN 'Oct'
        WHEN '11' THEN 'Nov' WHEN '12' THEN 'Dec'
    END AS __value
FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT [Month Record]
    FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
    WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM([Month Record])) != ''
) AS t
ORDER BY CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM([Month Record])) AS INT)

list.definition:
SELECT DISTINCT
    LTRIM(RTRIM([Mold No.])) AS __text,
    LTRIM(RTRIM([Mold No.])) AS __value
FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
WHERE [Mold No.] IS NOT NULL
  AND LTRIM(RTRIM([Mold No.])) != ''
  AND [Judgement [S]]] = 'X'              -- ✅ เฉพาะ Mold ที่มี NG เท่านั้น
ORDER BY __value
list.label: Mold No.
list.name: mold_no
list.query:
SELECT DISTINCT
    LTRIM(RTRIM([Mold No.])) AS __text,
    LTRIM(RTRIM([Mold No.])) AS __value
FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
WHERE [Mold No.] IS NOT NULL
  AND LTRIM(RTRIM([Mold No.])) != ''
  AND [Judgement [S]]] = 'X'              -- ✅ เฉพาะ Mold ที่มี NG เท่านั้น
ORDER BY __value

list.definition:
SELECT DISTINCT
    LTRIM(RTRIM([M/C No.])) AS __text,
    LTRIM(RTRIM([M/C No.])) AS __value
FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
WHERE [M/C No.] IS NOT NULL
  AND LTRIM(RTRIM([M/C No.])) != ''
  AND [Judgement [S]]] = 'X'                                        -- ✅ เฉพาะที่มี NG
  AND LTRIM(RTRIM([Mold No.])) IN (${mold_no:singlequote})         -- ✅ กรองตาม Mold No. ที่เลือก
ORDER BY __value
list.label: M/C No.
list.name: mc_no
list.query:
SELECT DISTINCT
    LTRIM(RTRIM([M/C No.])) AS __text,
    LTRIM(RTRIM([M/C No.])) AS __value
FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
WHERE [M/C No.] IS NOT NULL
  AND LTRIM(RTRIM([M/C No.])) != ''
  AND [Judgement [S]]] = 'X'                                        -- ✅ เฉพาะที่มี NG
  AND LTRIM(RTRIM([Mold No.])) IN (${mold_no:singlequote})         -- ✅ กรองตาม Mold No. ที่เลือก
ORDER BY __value

list.definition:
SELECT DISTINCT
    LTRIM(RTRIM([Part No.])) AS __text,
    LTRIM(RTRIM([Part No.])) AS __value
FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
WHERE [Part No.] IS NOT NULL
  AND LTRIM(RTRIM([Part No.])) != ''
  AND [Judgement [S]]] = 'X'                                        -- ✅ เฉพาะที่มี NG
  AND LTRIM(RTRIM([Mold No.])) IN (${mold_no:singlequote})         -- ✅ กรองตาม Mold No.
  AND LTRIM(RTRIM([M/C No.]))  IN (${mc_no:singlequote})           -- ✅ กรองตาม M/C No.
ORDER BY __value
list.label: Part No.
list.name: part_no
list.query:
SELECT DISTINCT
    LTRIM(RTRIM([Part No.])) AS __text,
    LTRIM(RTRIM([Part No.])) AS __value
FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
WHERE [Part No.] IS NOT NULL
  AND LTRIM(RTRIM([Part No.])) != ''
  AND [Judgement [S]]] = 'X'                                        -- ✅ เฉพาะที่มี NG
  AND LTRIM(RTRIM([Mold No.])) IN (${mold_no:singlequote})         -- ✅ กรองตาม Mold No.
  AND LTRIM(RTRIM([M/C No.]))  IN (${mc_no:singlequote})           -- ✅ กรองตาม M/C No.
ORDER BY __value
